name: cliproot
description: Provenance tracking for AI-assisted research and multi-agent workflows

level.title: Knowledge Automation Level
level.description: Knowledge automation level. Leave at 'curator' for Phase A — 'digest'/'wiki' activate in later versions.

anthropic_api_key.title: Anthropic API Key
anthropic_api_key.description: Optional. If set, overrides ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for flush/compile calls. Defaults to credentials from Claude Code login.
